TIL hardening an LLM PR-reviewer (adk-rust): agent *instructions* get state-templated — {key} is substituted from session state before the model ever sees it. We baked the diff into the instruction, so a diff containing {review_0} would splice in another file's findings, and any unknown {ident} hard-errored the run. Fix: route untrusted text through session state (single-pass, not re-scanned) — braces stay literal. Templating = injection surface.
